opinion.h1: 386 U.S. 8"> D'AMICO v. PENNSYLVANIA ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CIRCUIT. No. 858. Decided February 13, 1967.
opinion.p: The motion to dispense with printing the jurisdictional statement is granted.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
